title: Affected municipalities to hold elections within six months
doc_html:
§196.  Affected municipalities to hold elections within six months

It shall not be necessary that the consolidation elections in each of the municipalities affected be held at the same time; but no consolidation election shall be effective unless the municipalities affected have voted on the question within six months from the date of the first such election.
doc_text:
§196.  Affected municipalities to hold elections within six months
It shall not be necessary that the consolidation elections in each of the municipalities affected be held at the same time; but no consolidation election shall be effective unless the municipalities affected have voted on the question within six months from the date of the first such election.
